title: footgun test documents and asserts the field-put drops other fields behavior
description:
Why this choice is correct: integration_field_put_drops_other_fields exists specifically to prevent a future change from silently making field-put preserve other fields (which is not how KV v2 works). The module doc warns about it; the test pins the behavior. Together they mean no contributor can accidentally 'fix' it by adding a read-modify-write without the test breaking.

What a contributor might suggest: delete the test because it tests 'wrong' behavior. The test should stay — it documents a Vault platform constraint, not a bug to be fixed in secretx.
